name: Cucumber and Onion Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup White wine vinegar or cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE CUCUMBERS, ONION and salt in a colander.
2. PLACE THE COLANDER ON A PLATE AND PLACE IN THE REFRIGERATOR TO DRAIN FOR 3 HOURS.
3. RINSE THE CUCUMBERS AND ONIONS UNDER COLD WATER.
4. GENTLY BLEND THEM ("WRING THEM OUT" IN A TOWEL) TO ELIMINATE EXCESS WATER.
5. ADD THE SOUR CREAM, VINEGAR, SUGAR AND DILL TO THE MIXTURE.
6. STIR WELL AND SERVE.
